description: Direct question-based engagement prompting followers to share their favorite Ramadan beverages, leveraging seasonal consumption patterns and community participation.
structural_recipe: Post a relatable Ramadan beverage or drink image with an Arabic question asking followers about their favorite drink choice during Ramadan (e.g., 'ما هو مشروبك المفضل في رمضان؟'). Use simple, conversational Arabic to encourage comment responses. Structure as direct poll-style engagement without additional narrative.
why_it_works: Ramadan is a culturally significant period in Saudi Arabia with heightened purchasing intent and family gathering moments centered around food and beverages. Direct questions about personal preferences create low-friction participation opportunities and tap into the festive consumption mindset when followers are actively thinking about seasonal beverage choices.
transplantation_caveats: Highly seasonal—effectiveness is concentrated during Ramadan month only
Requires authentic Arabic language and cultural familiarity with Ramadan traditions
May have low engagement outside Gulf markets where Ramadan consumption patterns differ
